{{CargoRelic
|name=Advance Elixir
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source= One-Time Rent from [[Taoist Yu Ji]]
|description=In the mortal world lacking in spiritual energy, an Advance Elixir is enough to trigger a war between cultivators. After all, the vast majority of practitioners are only in the refinement phase. As long as they build a successful foundation, they will elevate to the upper-middle tier. Not only will their lifespan double, but they'll also be able to learn legendary techniques.
|fame=14
|art=14
|fth=28
|civ=18
|tech=16
|ss1=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +10<br>Wonder Fungi Eaten: 200/200
|ss2=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +20<br>Wonder Fungi Eaten: 200/200
|ss3=Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +30<br>Wonder Fungi Eaten: 200/200
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Wonder Fungus Boost]]
